zh.Bromsberrow, Gloucestershire, England: 英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾布洛姆斯貝洛
zh.Aldgate, London, England: 英國英格蘭倫敦阿爾蓋特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph de Bromwich於1306年出生在英國賀福爾維奧布利時，他的父親Anselme de Bromwich22歲，母親Alice de Aston of Warwickshire18歲。他和Eleanor de Bohum至少有4個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1333年在英國英格蘭倫敦阿爾蓋特享年27歲。

zh-hans.Bromsberrow, Gloucestershire, England: 英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾布洛姆斯貝洛
zh-hans.Aldgate, London, England: 英国英格兰倫敦阿爾蓋特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Ralph de Bromwich于1306年出生在英国賀福爾維奧布利时，他的父亲Anselme de Bromwich22岁，母亲Alice de Aston of Warwickshire18岁。他和Eleanor de Bohum至少有4个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1333年在英国英格兰倫敦阿爾蓋特享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bromwich
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from West Bromwich (Staffs) or Castle and Little Bromwich (Warwicks).

variants.name: Bromage
meanings: English (Warwickshire and Worcestershire): habitational name from West Bromwich in Staffordshire, or Castle and Little Bromwich in Warwickshire, named in Old English with brōm ‘broom’ (the shrub) + wīc ‘outlying dairy farm’. Compare Brumage .

variants.name: Brimage
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Brumage  . This name is comparatively rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph de Bromwich was born in 1306, in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, his father, Anselme de Bromwich, was 22 and his mother, Alice de Aston of Warwickshire, was 18. He had at least 4 sons and 3 daughters with Eleanor de Bohum. He died in 1333, in Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph de Bromwich est né en 1306, à Weobley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Anselme de Bromwich, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Alice de Aston of Warwickshire, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles avec Eleanor de Bohum. Il est décédé en 1333, à Aldgate, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Ralph de Bromwich 1306 in Weobley, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Anselme de Bromwich 22 und seine Mutter Alice de Aston of Warwickshire 18. Er hatte mit Eleanor de Bohum mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1333 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Aldgate, London, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph de Bromwich è nato il nel 1306 nel Weobley, Herefordshire, England, il suo padre, Anselme de Bromwich, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Alice de Aston of Warwickshire, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie con Eleanor de Bohum. Morì nel 1333, nel Aldgate, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.Bromsberrow, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブロムスバーロー
ja.Aldgate, London, England: イギリスイギリスロンドンアルドガト
ja.Weobley, Herefordshire, England: イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウエオブリー
ja.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Bromwichが1306年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウエオブリーで生まれた時，父Anselme de Bromwichは22歳，母Alice de Aston of Warwickshireは18歳であった。彼はEleanor de Bohumとの間に少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1333年にイギリスイギリスロンドンアルドガトで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph de Bromwich(이)가 1306년 영국 허퍼드실르 베오블리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Anselme de Bromwich(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice de Aston of Warwickshire(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Eleanor de Bohum(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1333년 영국 잉글랜드 런던 알드가트에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Aldgate, London, England: Aldgate, London, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Ralph de Bromwich nasceu em 1306, em Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Anselme de Bromwich, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Alice de Aston of Warwickshire, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas com Eleanor de Bohum. Ele faleceu em 1333, em Aldgate, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph de Bromwich родился в 1306 г. в местности веобли, хирефордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Anselme de Bromwich было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Alice de Aston of Warwickshire, 18. У него было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери от Eleanor de Bohum. Он умер в 1333 г. в местности алджэит, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Ralph de Bromwich nació en 1306, en Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Anselme de Bromwich, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Alice de Aston of Warwickshire, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas con Eleanor de Bohum. Murió en 1333, en Aldgate, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 27 años.
